import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { AccountService } from '@app/_services'; @Component({ templateUrl: 'details.component.html', standalone: false }) export class DetailsComponent { constructor(private accountService: AccountService) {} get account() { return this.accountService.accountValue; } }
